name: AI infrastructure supply chain
description: Layered map of power, physical infrastructure, silicon, networking, and cloud demand.

layers.name: Power generation
layers.description: Generation assets and power providers exposed to data-centre load growth.

layers.name: Grid and electrical equipment
layers.description: Transformers, switchgear, power distribution, and grid services.

layers.name: Data-centre cooling and power
layers.description: Thermal management, UPS, power shelves, and data-centre infrastructure.

layers.name: Semiconductor equipment
layers.description: Lithography, deposition, etch, inspection, and process control.

layers.name: Foundry and packaging
layers.description: Leading-edge wafer manufacturing and advanced packaging capacity.

layers.name: HBM and memory
layers.description: High-bandwidth memory and supporting memory supply.

layers.name: AI accelerators and ASICs
layers.description: GPUs, custom silicon, networking silicon, and accelerator platforms.

layers.name: Optical and networking
layers.description: Switching, optical interconnect, fibre, and high-speed connectivity.

layers.name: Systems and integration
layers.description: Servers, racks, EMS, and AI factory integration.

layers.name: Cloud and hyperscalers
layers.description: Cloud platforms and AI compute buyers.
